title: wedelia ehrenbergii var. ehrenbergii
intro: Wedelia ehrenbergii var. ehrenbergii, commonly known as the yellow-flowered Wedelia or yellow-flowered creeping cudweed, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it a popular choice for traditional medicine. The health benefits of Wedelia ehrenbergii var. ehrenbergii include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a natural remedy for digestive issues and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
